nasb.text: for kings and all who are in authority, so that we may lead a tranquil and quiet life in all godliness and dignity.

esv.text: for kings and all who are in high positions, that we may lead a peaceful and quiet life, godly and dignified in every way.

ccb.text: 也要为所有的君王和掌权者祷告，使我们可以怀着虔诚、端正的心过和平安宁的生活。

csbs.text: 好使我们能完全敬神、庄重地过平静安稳的生活。
